chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-4020 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.16492/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1-3. 3. For order on CMA No.16493/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025. Mr. Saeed Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------- 1. Granted. 2-4. Learned counsel submits that this Petition is not being pressed inasmuch as the Petitioner has already preferred a bail application before the statutory forum in view of the amendment to the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act 2024. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
